name: China Hospitals Guide API
description: Machine-readable hospital directory for AI agents and developers

hospitals.description: Get all hospitals with trust scores and structured data

parameters.city: Filter by city (Beijing, Shanghai, Guangzhou, Shenzhen, Hangzhou, Chengdu)
parameters.specialty: Filter by specialty tag (cardiology, oncology, orthopedics, etc.)

usage_example.description: Example query from an AI agent
usage_example.prompt: I need a world-class cardiologist in Shanghai, budget $10,000, prefer JCI accredited
